channel.title: WooCommerce Memberships plugin
channel.description:
**--- [Roadmap Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/WooCommerce-Memberships-plugin-986b0cb463a14f289f0d38eb01ebfc75)**
## Description WooCommerce has a [plugin](https://woocommerce.com/products/woocommerce-memberships/) for memberships with support for the REST API. We could build a package to let this work by default.
## User Stories
> As a **Frontity user** > I want to **have a package for WooCommerce Memberships plugin** > so that **I don't have to build my own logic**

item.title: WooCommerce Memberships plugin
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
— Roadmap Card

Description

WooCommerce has a plugin for memberships with support for the REST API. We could build a package to let this work by default.

User Stories

As a Frontity user
I want to have a package for WooCommerce Memberships plugin
so that I don’t have to build my own logic

Read full topic
